description: A civil engineer needs to review the geotechnical report for a site to determine the required foundation design for a new building.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the geotechnical report for the project site.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls up the soil investigation report.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the report to find the soil bearing capacity and recommendations for foundation type.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer finds the report recommends deep pile foundations due to poor soil conditions.

nodes.task_description: Update the project's design basis document to specify the use of pile foundations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the design basis to reflect the geotechnical requirements.
